user_feedback: why when i walk do the tiles sometimes light up ands ometiems don;t can you fix that
analysis:
- Issue identified: Tiles only get marked as "visited" (and light up) when the player walks on EMPTY tiles. When walking on event tiles (treasure, trap, enemy, NPC, mystery, weapon, exit), they don't get marked as visited, causing inconsistent visual feedback.
- Files affected: player.js
- Changes needed: Modify the `moveTo` method to mark ALL tiles as visited when stepped on, not just EMPTY tiles. Keep the exploration points reward only for EMPTY tiles to maintain game balance.
